title: Poses Pack
description: Adds a bunch of preset poses to the Better Armor Stands Module. This can be really hand for applying common poses.
body: # Poses Pack by Gamemode 4 Customize your armour stands within an inch of their life. Make every part of them posed to your desire. ### Features - Requires the base [Better Armour Stands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ib7YfS5V) data pack - Adds some default poses to armour stands to get your started - Adds ability to pose arms, legs and head to some default positions Read more options for poses on the [Wiki](https://wiki.gm4.co/Better_Armour_Stands/Poses_Pack). ### More Info [ **Watch on Youtube**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZBqmGpAXqmw&t=217s) [ **Read the Wiki**](https://wiki.gm4.co/wiki/Poses_Pack) ### Credits - Creators: [Sparks](https://bsky.app/profile/selcouthsparks.bsky.social) - Updated by: [Misode](https://bsky.app/profile/misode.dev), [Denniss](https://github.com/Dennis-0) - Icon Design: [DuckJr](https://twitter.com/DuckJr94) --- ## About Gamemode 4 Gamemode 4 is a series of command-powered creations that are designed to change and enhance the survival experience. All of our modules are designed to work together flawlessly, and are balanced for usage in a survival setting. Pick and choose your favorites from our [website](https://gm4.co), or wherever you get datapacks.
